title: Pug Origins
description: An origins fantasy and engineering modpack that expands the Overworld, Nether, End with exploration, dungeons, structures, and Create mod automation.
body:
✅ Project Description
🔮 Overview
This modpack takes a Vanilla+ approach to Minecraft, enhancing the core game while keeping it intuitive and immersive. It focuses on expanding all four dimensions—Overworld, Nether, End, and Aether—and introduces Create mod engineering, fantasy mobs, and exploration-focused gameplay.

Whether you want to build working contraptions with gears and shafts, raid massive underground dungeons, or explore mystical new biomes, this modpack provides an exciting survival experience without overwhelming complexity.

⚙️ Features
🛠 Engineering with Create

Full Create suite: Create, Create Addition, Create Contraptions, Create Structures.

Build kinetic machines, automated farms, elevators, and steampunk tech.

🌍 Biomes & Structures

World generation enhanced with Terralith, Nullscape, Better Nether, and Deep Aether.

Massive dungeons, ruins, temples, and structures added by When Dungeons Arise, Yung’s Better series, and more.

🧭 Exploration & Immersion

New content in every dimension: Aether, Lost Aether Content, Ocean’s Delight, End’s Delight, Tide, and Incendium.

Expanded NPC and mob variety with Friends and Foes, Citadel, and Happy Ghast.

New foods and farming systems via Farmer’s Delight and related addons.

🚀 Performance & QoL

Smoother performance with FerriteCore, Embeddium, EntityCulling, and Clumps.

Exploration tools like Xaero’s Minimap and World Map.

Useful UI improvements including JEI, Appleskin, and shader support via Oculus.

🌐 Multiplayer & Compatibility
Client + Server Required – All players need the modpack installed locally.

Uses Forge 1.20.1.

Designed for private multiplayer use but fully supports single-player.

Focused on fair, survival-based gameplay with no unfair client-side advantages.

📦 Who Should Play This?
This modpack is perfect for players who:

Want a balanced survival experience with new biomes, dungeons, and structures

Enjoy Create mod machines and light RPG/fantasy elements

Prefer performance-optimized Vanilla+ packs that are easy to get into and stable for servers
